metadata.title: Punta Piedra – Homes & Lots for Sale South of Ensenada, Baja California
metadata.description: Punta Piedra offers residential lots and homes in a pristine natural setting south of Ensenada. Build your Baja California retreat with Pacific Ocean access and stunning coastal scenery.

hero.description: Punta Piedra Misión is a residential development on the northwest coast of Baja California, designed for those seeking an exclusive lifestyle.

lotExplorer.selectLotHint: Select a lot to see details

houseModels.label: House models
houseModels.name: Santo Tomás
houseModels.modelImageAlt: Santo Tomás house model floor plan

dreamHome.body: Live near the sea and end your day with the most beautiful sunsets. Punta Piedra Misión offers the best of Baja within reach — just 25 minutes from Valle de Guadalupe.

certifyBanner.text: We certify so you can build your future
